_comment: Curated hard-override blocklist of known-compromised package VERSIONS. Checked alongside the OSV API as defense-in-depth: a curated match blocks even if OSV hasn't flagged the version yet, and it still works offline. Only EXACT pinned versions match — never a blanket package-name block. Refresh monthly in CI from the OpenSSF malicious-packages feed; OSV (online) covers everything else dynamically.
_source: OpenSSF malicious-packages (Apache-2.0) + OSV (CC-BY-4.0) + curated incident reports

entries.name: litellm
entries.reason: CI/CD poisoned Trivy Action, PyPI token exfil, .pth auto-exec payload (March 2026)

entries.name: axios
entries.reason: Maintainer account hijack, RAT via plain-crypto-js (March 2026)
